description: Composition Grey brief made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex fabric, has the signature logo on the contrast waistband, shaped-to-Fit contoured pouch, print on the right side of the brief and printed label on the inner Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cold iron if needed Revel in the comfort of soft cotton/spandex fabric with these grey fashion brief from spykar. Crafted from a quick dry fabric, the cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the printed label offers abrasion-free comfort.
